Closes #

## Status discipline

<!-- Match the README Status table convention. Tick the right one. -->

- [ ] ✅ This PR adds or changes something **implemented** (real working code, tested).
- [ ] 📐 This PR documents something **designed** (whitepaper or roadmap text, no executing code).
- [ ] 🔬 This PR documents something **research** / **Phase 3+ vision** (clearly labeled as such).
- [ ] 📝 Docs / examples / translation only.

## Tests

- [ ] New behavior is covered by a new test, or this PR adds a regression test for a fixed bug.
- [ ] `python tests/test_basic.py` passes locally.
- [ ] If this PR touches the whitepaper, `whitepaper/_build_pdf.js` was re-run and the PDF is updated.

## Anything reviewer should know

<!-- Tradeoffs you considered, things you're unsure about, follow-up PRs you plan. Leave blank if there's nothing. -->
